text: You know, humans spend two and a half trillion hours every year bent over screens, manipulating
spreadsheets, compiling reports, sifting through emails.
But what if things didn't have to be this way?
What if AI could use the same tools that we do?
What if AI could think like we do?
What if it could reach out to your colleagues, collaborate on ideas, and shape your next
Whether you're an analyst deciphering market trends, a doctor striving to reconnect with
your patients, an engineer delivering a crucial innovation, or even a teacher shaping the
minds of our next generation, context frees you to get back to the things that actually
matter instead of drowning in endless research, paperwork, and menial tasks.
Because when we spend less time in front of our screens, we spend more time being human.
